name: twitter-x-actor
title: Twitter/X Growth Signal Scraper
description: Scrapes Twitter/X for growth and hiring signals from target handles and keywords

input.title: Input
input.description: Twitter handles, search keywords, and score thresholds for signal extraction.

xHandles.title: Twitter/X handles
xHandles.description: List of handles to track without the @ prefix.

lookbackDays.title: Days to look back
lookbackDays.description: Only include tweets published within this many days.

minScore.title: Minimum tweet score
minScore.description: Minimum heuristic relevance score required for a tweet to become a signal.
